About Me

Defending systems,
one vulnerability
at a time

I'm a fourth-year Cyber Security student at the University of Science and Technology of Hanoi (USTH). I specialize in Penetration Testing and SOC operations, with strong experience in Forensics and Reverse Engineering through competitive CTF events.

When I'm not hacking away at CTF challenges, you'll find me self-learning on TryHackMe, Hack The Box, and PortSwigger Academy — or leading student activities as class monitor and president of the USTH M&M Music Club 🎵.

Location Hanoi, Vietnam 🇻🇳
Email zudangbuon@gmail.com
Phone 0822 872 666
Languages Vietnamese · English · French
Internship Open to opportunities

Education & Activities

Education

2023 – 2027 (Expected)

B.Sc. Cyber Security

University of Science and Technology of Hanoi (USTH)

Year 1 GPA: 3.0 · Year 2 GPA: 3.2. Focus on penetration testing, network security, and system administration.

Projects

Academic Projects

Hands-on security and infrastructure projects from university coursework.

Linux Infrastructure & Security
GitHub
Infrastructure USTH

Linux Infrastructure & Security Labs

Deployed WordPress + MariaDB on multiple VMs with remote SSH administration. Set up monitoring with Prometheus + Grafana. Built backup system with RAID5 + LVM + NFS. Designed multi-subnet network with iptables firewall rules.

DebianSSHPrometheusGrafanaRAID5iptablesBash
Network File Transfer
GitHub
Networking USTH

Multi-Client File Transfer Server

Network programming course project — a multi-client file transfer server built with socket programming.
